# PHP Basic Webserver

PHP web server using built-in server with health endpoint and Docker support

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Web Server Templates |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Tools** | dev-php-laravel |
| **Website** | [https://www.php.net](https://www.php.net) |
| **Docs** | [https://www.php.net/docs.php](https://www.php.net/docs.php) |

## About

A minimal PHP web server using PHPs built-in server with a health check endpoint, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.
